---
name: Feature request
about: An idea for something the platform should do
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: tg12
---

## The problem this solves

What is currently missing, slow, or painful? Describe the operational situation where this feature would matter.

## Proposed solution

What should the platform do? Be as specific as you can about the behaviour, not the implementation.

## Which part of the platform does this affect

<!-- tick any that apply -->
- [ ] Map display / overlays
- [ ] A specific data source (name it below)
- [ ] Event detail panel
- [ ] Search or filtering
- [ ] Intel tables
- [ ] Source health / monitoring
- [ ] Time window or temporal filtering
- [ ] Proximity query
- [ ] Export / copy / share
- [ ] New data source integration
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Mobile / small screen
- [ ] Something else

## How important is this to your workflow

- [ ] Nice to have
- [ ] Would use it regularly
- [ ] Blocking real work — I need this

## Alternatives you have considered

Are there workarounds you are currently using? What is wrong with them?

## Additional context

Screenshots, diagrams, links to related sources, or anything else that helps frame the request.
